blockers.description: Phase 9 verified complete but Phase 10 not yet planned
blockers.workaround: None needed - this is a natural pause point

blockers.description: Spring AI MiniMax API key needs to be set via MINIMAX_API_KEY environment variable
blockers.workaround: Set MINIMAX_API_KEY env var before starting backend

human_actions_pending.action: Set MINIMAX_API_KEY environment variable and start backend to test hosting
human_actions_pending.context: Spring Boot app requires MINIMAX_API_KEY to start without errors

decisions.decision: Phase 9 subdomain hosting infrastructure built with SubdomainFilter, SiteController, SiteService
Spring AI uses spring.ai.openai.api-key config (not minimax.api.key)

context_notes: v1.1 milestone: Phases 6-9 complete. Phase 10 (Payments & VIP) is last phase. Compilation issues fixed (duplicate spring: key, Spring AI API compatibility, missing dependencies). Backend compiles and starts if MINIMAX_API_KEY is set.
